originalTitle: Snowflake’s stock surges nearly 40% as AI acceleration drives record product-revenue growth
summary: Snowflake’s stock soars toward a record gain after an earnings beat, a raised outlook and a $6 billion commitment to expand its collaboration with Amazon’s AWS.
content: Snowflake’s stock soars toward a record gain after an earnings beat, a raised outlook and a $6 billion commitment to expand its collaboration with Amazon’s AWS.
chineseTitle: AI 加速推动产品收入创纪录增长，Snowflake 股价飙升近 40%
chineseSummary: 在盈利超出预期、上调前景以及承诺斥资 60 亿美元扩大与亚马逊 AWS 的合作后，Snowflake 的股价飙升至创纪录水平。
chineseContent: 在盈利超出预期、上调前景以及承诺斥资 60 亿美元扩大与亚马逊 AWS 的合作后，Snowflake 的股价飙升至创纪录水平。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
